app.title: FOSS4G Hiroshima 2026 Talks Viewer
app.subtitle: Explore sessions in a semantic map
nearby.title: Near the scope
nearby.hint: Pan the map; sessions near the center appear here.
bookmark.empty: No sessions saved yet. Click the star on a session to add it.
bookmark.title: My Schedule
about.title: About this site
about.description: This is an unofficial web application that visualizes FOSS4G Hiroshima 2026 conference sessions on a concept map. Sessions are positioned based on their content similarity using natural language processing technology and mapped with MapLibre GL JS. Session content is in English, but you can switch the display to multiple languages via machine translation. Easily discover interesting talks and plan your schedule.
about.features.title: Features
about.features.map: **Concept Map**: Sessions are positioned by topic similarity
about.features.search: **Search & Filter**: Find sessions by keywords, tags, tracks, or clusters
about.features.bookmark: **My Schedule**: Bookmark sessions and export/import your schedule
about.features.nearby: **Nearby View**: Explore sessions near the map center
about.logo.title: Logo Attribution
about.logo.description: The FOSS4G 2026 Hiroshima logo is licensed under CC-BY-4.0 by the official conference organizing committee.
